Notice Of Motion And Motion To Exclude Expert Rhoma Young
Off Calendar Dec-15-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Margaret Engelhardt, Esq., for defendant and moving party: Catholic Healthcare West


No other appearance stated. After hearing, tentative ruling is adopted. Defendant Catholic Healthcare West's motion to exclude expert witness Rhoma Young is denied without prejudice to defendant making the motion at the time of trial. While the Court previously permitted plaintiff to amend her expert disclosure to designate a witness regarding the subject of latex allergy and workplace accommodation, there is no authority in the context of a discovery motion to exclude the potential testimony of said witness because the qualifications of the witness may present issues pursuant to Evidence Code Section 720(a). The Court notes that Defendant initially disclosed Dr. Kenneth Kim as an expert regarding plaintiff's alleged latex allergy and "whether a reasonable accommodation could be made for plaintiff as a nurse in light of her allergy."
Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.
